extras.content: deny sb. nothing 对某人百依百顺 // there is no denying that... 不可否认的是 There's no denying that this is a serious blow. 无可否认这是个严重的打击。

senses.example: Some people who have strong self-respect often reject others' offers for help.
senses.example_zh: 有些自尊心强的人经常拒绝别人提供的帮助。

senses.example: We rejected his idea for a music club, and decided to have an art club instead.
senses.example_zh: 我们没有采纳他关于成立音乐俱乐部的想法，而是决定成立艺术俱乐部。

senses.def_en: to order (sb.) not to do sth.
senses.example: The dormitory supervisor forbade the boarders to play loud music.
senses.example_zh: 宿舍管理员不准住校生把音乐放得太大声。

entries.mnemonic: ex(out)+clude(关闭)→关在门外→把…排除在外

senses.def_en: to prevent from entering; keep out
senses.example: Some places of entertainment exclude people under 18.
senses.example_zh: 一些娱乐场所禁止18岁以下的未成年人进入。

senses.def_en: to declare untrue; refuse to admit
senses.example_zh: 否认错误就是加倍错误。

senses.def_en: to refuse to give (sth.) to sb.
senses.example: Some students are denied the chance of going to university because they are poor.
senses.example_zh: 有些学生因为穷而得不到上大学的机会。

derivatives: denial n. 否认;拒绝;抛弃

entries.mnemonic: in(not)+fin(界限)+ite→没有界限的→无限的

senses.def_en: without limits in space or time
senses.example: Indulging in computer games all day may do infinite harm to students.
